title: Week 3: Meera Starts Event Tracking Dashboard
paragraphs: Meera entered the Stellar Journey track with a product analytics background and quickly noticed a common gap: teams had event logs but not decision-ready visibility. Her objective became building a dashboard that translates on-chain activity into practical product signals.

Her target project surfaces wallet connections, contract actions, failed transactions, and repeat usage over short windows. She designed the dashboard around operational questions first, asking what changed today before exposing deeper technical metrics. That decision helped her keep the interface useful for both technical and non-technical teammates.

She picked this problem because she had seen small issues become major blockers when teams lacked timely visibility. In her view, clarity creates execution speed. By improving visibility, she is indirectly improving product quality and release confidence.

Meera is implementing with reliability-first rules: idempotent ingestion, safe retries, and sync freshness indicators on every panel. She recently transitioned jobs and still protects weekends for deep build sessions. That routine has helped her ship one stable module every week.
